entry.title: New: Bill 126 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2026 BUDGET, OFFICE OF THE MAYOR, ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT PROGRAM, TO DECREASE APPROPRIATION FOR MOLOKAI AND LĀNAʻI YOUTH AND STUDENT TRAVEL, AND ADD CONDITIONAL LANGUAGE FOR LĀNA‘I COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
